languages.text: {n}Вы торопливо перечитываете запись. Cебериан упорно пытался проникнуть за закрытую дверь. Достиг ли он своей цели или повернул назад?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы торопливо перечитываете запись. Cебериан упорно пытался проникнуть за закрытую дверь. Достиг ли он своей цели или повернул назад?{/n}

languages.text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы торопливо перечитываете запись. Cебериан упорно пытался проникнуть за закрытую дверь. Достиг ли он своей цели или повернул назад?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian persistently sought to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}
{n}You skim through the entry in a hurry. Somewhere nearby is a passage Seberian sought to enter, whatever it took him. Did he succeed?{/n}
{n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}
{n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}
{n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian persistently sought to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

languages.text: {n}你迫不及待地重读那条记录。塞贝里安一直执着于突破那扇紧闭的大门。他成功了吗，还是最终选择了折返？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你迫不及待地重读那条记录。塞贝里安一直执着于突破那扇紧闭的大门。他成功了吗，还是最终选择了折返？{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vuelves a leer la entrada con interés. Seberian fue persistente en sus intentos por cruzar la puerta cerrada. ¿Llegaría a conseguirlo, o tal vez tuvo que dar media vuelta?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vuelves a leer la entrada con interés. Seberian fue persistente en sus intentos por cruzar la puerta cerrada. ¿Llegaría a conseguirlo, o tal vez tuvo que dar media vuelta?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous relisez l'entrée hâtivement. Seberian s'est donné beaucoup de mal pour franchir la porte verrouillée. A-t-il réussi ou a-t-il fini par renoncer ?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous relisez l'entrée hâtivement. Seberian s'est donné beaucoup de mal pour franchir la porte verrouillée. A-t-il réussi ou a-t-il fini par renoncer ?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Girdiyi hevesle tekrar okuyorsun. Seberian, kapalı kapıyı geçme çabalarında ısrarcıydı. Başardı mı yoksa geri mi döndü?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Girdiyi hevesle tekrar okuyorsun. Seberian, kapalı kapıyı geçme çabalarında ısrarcıydı. Başardı mı yoksa geri mi döndü?{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du liest den Eintrag aufgeregt noch einmal. Seberian wollte unbedingt durch die geschlossene Tür. War er erfolgreich oder ist er umgekehrt?{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du liest den Eintrag aufgeregt noch einmal. Seberian wollte unbedingt durch die geschlossene Tür. War er erfolgreich oder ist er umgekehrt?{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは熱心にその記録を読み返す。セベリアンは、閉ざされた扉を抜けようと粘り強く試みていた。彼は成功したのか、それとも引き返したのか？{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You eagerly reread the entry. Seberian was persistent in his efforts to get past the closed door. Did he succeed, or did he turn back?{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたは熱心にその記録を読み返す。セベリアンは、閉ざされた扉を抜けようと粘り強く試みていた。彼は成功したのか、それとも引き返したのか？{/n}
